# ralph-cli

## Build / Test / Lint

- Build: `npm run build`
- Test: `npm test` (1071 tests, vitest)
- Typecheck: `npx tsc --noEmit`
- Lint: `npm run lint`
- Dev: `npm link` ‚Üí `ralph <command>`

## Key Commands

```bash
ralph run plan                  # Agent generates IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md from specs
ralph run                       # Build loop: task ‚Üí staged validation ‚Üí adversarial ‚Üí score ‚Üí repeat
ralph run --dry-run             # Show prompts + stage pipeline without executing
ralph run --verbose --max 10    # Verbose, capped at 10 iterations

ralph score --calibration       # Trust drift analysis (pass rate, discard rate, volatility)
ralph score --trend             # Sparkline + best/worst

ralph review --intent           # Review with spec motivation cross-referencing
ralph heal                      # Run diagnostics ‚Üí agent fixes issues

ralph gc --temporal             # Pattern evolution timeline
ralph gc --temporal --last 5    # Last 5 snapshots

ralph lint                      # Architectural enforcement
ralph grade                     # Quality grading (5 dimensions, per domain)
ralph doctor                    # Repo readiness diagnostics
ralph init                      # Scaffold project structure
ralph promote                   # Escalate preferences (doc ‚Üí lint ‚Üí pattern)
ralph ref                       # Manage external reference docs
```

## Architecture

- **Layers:** config ‚Üí utils ‚Üí commands ‚Üí cli (forward-only)
- **16 command domains** under `src/commands/`, each self-contained
- **6 documented cross-command exceptions** in ARCHITECTURE.md
- **File size limit:** 600 lines. Split if approaching.
- **All output** through `src/utils/output.ts` ‚Äî no raw `console.log`

Key domains for trust calibration:
- `run/` ‚Äî build loop + staged validation (`stages.ts`) + adversarial testing (`adversarial.ts`)
- `score/` ‚Äî fitness scoring + calibration tracking (`calibration.ts`)
- `review/` ‚Äî code review + intent verification (`prompts.ts` has `INTENT_REVIEW_TEMPLATE`)
- `gc/` ‚Äî drift detection + approach divergence (`fingerprint.ts`)

## Config

- `config/schema.ts` ‚Äî types, `config/defaults.ts` ‚Äî defaults, `config/validate.ts` + `validators.ts` + `validate-run.ts` ‚Äî validation
- Config walks up dirs for `.ralph/config.yml`, merges with defaults

## Operational Notes

- **ESM only** ‚Äî `.ts` imports resolve to `.js`. Never `require()`.
- **`exactOptionalPropertyTypes`** ‚Äî optional props need `| undefined`
- **Test isolation** ‚Äî tests `chdir()` to temp dirs. Restore `origCwd` in `afterEach`.
- **LLM-agnostic** ‚Äî zero references to specific AI providers in source or templates
- **Results TSV** ‚Äî 9 columns. Status: `pass`, `fail`, `discard`, `timeout`, `adversarial-fail`

## Extended Reference

Full project structure, trust calibration details, and documentation index ‚Üí `docs/AGENTS_DETAIL.md`
